indicator_description: Rider-facing weather forecast plots for the Kluane Chilkat International Bike Relay. Plots show expected temperature, rain, wind effect, gusts, cloud cover, and UV index along the route.
title: KCIBR weather forecast for a 6-hour rider
subtitle: 6-hour rider
description: Race-day weather guidance along the KCIBR route. The upper panel shows temperature and rain near the rider's estimated arrival time. The lower panels show wind effect, gusts, cloud cover, and UV index. Forecast timing is estimated from the selected finish time and a route-based pacing profile.
